comicStrip.heading: From isolated programmes to a connected data space

frames.caption: Programme as PDF: beautiful for humans, awkward for machines.
Platforms re-enter every entry by hand – manually.
An open JSON interface makes data machine-readable.
The Cultural Data Space distributes it to whoever needs it.

pitch.heading: We lay the pipeline – you keep control
body: This project is commissioned by Deutscher Bühnenverein as Use Case 3 of the Cultural Data Space and is part of Germany's digital strategy.
Theatres get a standardised interface for their programmes – and remain the owners of their data.
